mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in real retail activity proxied by RSAFS signals resilient household demand and stronger near-term earnings revisions, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS latest available value was 492008 as of two months before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window or produces positive returns in no more than 50% of top-quintile observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE greater than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals labor-market deterioration and recession-risk repricing, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:UNRATE latest available value was 4.1 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is rising while CPIAUCSL inflation momentum is also rising, policy tightening is interpreted as inflation-fighting rather than growth-supportive, raising discount rates and producing negative 60-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises >= 0.25pp in 3 months and CPIAUCSL 6-month inflation momentum rises
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
series:CPIAUCSL
fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value was 1.51 as of one month before the decision date
fact:CPIAUCSL latest available value was 249.462 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint tightening-and-inflation trigger has nonnegative average 60-day forward S&P 500 returns or if either single series alone explains the signal with no incremental interaction effect.

mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in INDPRO signals broadening production and improving operating leverage for cyclicals, leading to positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:INDPRO latest available value was 106.5109 as of two months before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum has a negative Rank IC with 20-day S&P 500 returns over two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A downward break in HOUST below its trailing 12-month average signals weakening housing demand and pressure on rate-sensitive consumption, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 12-month average
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:HOUST latest available value was 1236 as of two months before the decision date
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with rate-sensitive demand
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside crossings are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations or have no negative return spread versus nontriggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: Strong PAYEMS growth combined with UNRATE at or below 4.5 percent signals continued income growth without visible labor deterioration, supporting earnings expectations and positive 20-day S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month growth is positive and UNRATE <= 4.5
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
series:UNRATE
fact:PAYEMS latest available value was 148230 as of one month before the decision date
fact:UNRATE latest available value was 4.1 as of one month before the decision date
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with tight labor markets
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and low-UNRATE condition produces 20-day returns no higher than unconditional returns or if positive PAYEMS growth alone fully explains the effect.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month upward crossing in FEDFUNDS signals a fresh policy-rate shock that immediately raises equity discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest available value was 1.51 as of one month before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 1-month FEDFUNDS crossings are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered observations or show no negative mean return impact.

mechanism_narrative: Acceleration in GDPC1 over the latest two reported quarters signals stronger aggregate demand and earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days despite publication lag.
evidence_refs: series:GDPC1
fact:GDPC1 latest available value was 17286.497 as of six months before the decision date
failure_condition: Reject if two-quarter GDPC1 acceleration has Rank IC below 0.03 for 60-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window or if accelerated quarters do not outperform decelerated quarters.
